DP.258.0000:
Byron: Hm?
You’re in training, then?\f
You know, my son trains as hard as
you do.\f
But I still treat him as if he were
a child.\f
It’s ridiculous, really.
He is a proper Gym Leader and all.\f
It’s always tricky between a father
and son, it seems.\f
Humph, I’ve wasted your time.
Take this as my apology!\f
DP.258.0001:
There are Pokémon that evolve into
the Steel type using that Metal Coat.\f
They need to hold that item while
being traded to evolve.\f
Try using it if you’d like.
Farewell!\f
